{
  "project": "TraderFrame — Evidence Gate",
  "narrative_concept": "The Evidence Gate shader visualizes the transition of chaotic, unverified market data into structured, risk-aware trading intelligence. It features a dynamic, interactive boundary (the 'Gate') that divides the screen into two zones: a high-entropy, warm-hued 'Unfiltered Noise' zone, and a highly structured, cool-toned 'Calm Precision' grid. As the user interacts or advances the transition, the gate sweeps across the screen, filtering noise into clean, geometric evidence streams.",
  "brand_alignment": {
    "evidence_first": "Visualizes raw data points aligning into solid structural coordinates at the gate boundary.",
    "transparent_reasoning": "The filtering mechanism is mathematically exposed through a glowing, interactive transition wave.",
    "user_control": "Mouse coordinates warp the gate, allowing the user to manually 'probe' and filter specific regions of market noise.",
    "risk_awareness": "Chromatic aberration and high-frequency noise represent risk, which dampens into stable, monochromatic grids post-filtering.",
    "calm_precision": "The final state utilizes ultra-fine lines, dark slate backgrounds, and emerald/teal accents."
  },
  "performance_specification": {
    "target_platforms": ["Desktop (Modern)", "Mobile (High-End)", "WebGL2 Capable Browsers"],
    "performance_class": "Medium-to-High (Optimized fragment-heavy shader with procedural noise)",
    "fallback_strategy": "On low-performance devices, procedural multi-octave noise is bypassed in favor of a single-texture lookup, and chromatic aberration is disabled."
  },
  "uniforms": [
    {
      "name": "u_time",
      "type": "float",
      "description": "Elapsed time in seconds for continuous wave and noise animations.",
      "default": 0.0,
      "range": [0.0, 10000.0],
      "narrative_mapping": "Represents the continuous, relentless flow of real-time market data."
    },
    {
      "name": "u_resolution",
      "type": "vec2",
      "description": "Viewport resolution in pixels.",
      "default": [1920.0, 1080.0],
      "range": null,
      "narrative_mapping": "Ensures pixel-perfect rendering of the fine precision grid lines."
    },
    {
      "name": "u_mouse",
      "type": "vec2",
      "description": "Normalized mouse coordinates (0.0 to 1.0) representing user interaction
warning: Provider returned invalid JSON. Preserved as raw text.
